description_long: This object consists of three bananas arranged side by side, each displaying a different stage of ripeness. The banana on the left is heavily browned and mottled, with dark spots and a shriveled stem, indicating advanced aging. The middle banana is partially yellow with some brown patches, showing moderate ripeness and a slightly firmer texture. The rightmost banana is mostly yellow with a hint of green near the stem, appearing fresher and firmer than the others. All three bananas have smooth, slightly glossy peels with visible surface blemishes and natural curvature. The stems are fibrous and textured, and the tips are rounded and intact. The bananas are depicted with realistic surface details, including subtle bruising and color gradients.
description: A group of three bananas in varying ripeness, with smooth, blemished peels and natural curvature, arranged side by side.
description_view_0: Three bananas are shown from the side, highlighting their curved shapes and the progression from yellow to brown peels.
description_view_1: The bananas are viewed from the stem end, showing the fibrous, textured stems and the color differences along the peels.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the bananas is visible, emphasizing the smooth, yellow peel of the rightmost banana and the dark, mottled surface of the leftmost one.
description_view_3: The bananas are seen from the tip end, displaying the rounded ends and the transition of colors from yellow to brown.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels show visible blemishes, bruising, and some dark spots, especially on the leftmost banana. There are no tears or splits, and the surface appears mostly intact but with some wrinkling and mottling.
